prompt: Build an offline NYC subway explorer where I can browse stations, trace connections, and plan routes manually.
Create a sky-position calculator that shows altitude, azimuth, rise, set, and culmination times for a selected celestial body.
Build a local video catalog where I can add titles, browse by genre, search, and view details for my collection.
Create a quick wireframe tool that lets me sketch a landing page layout and export the resulting HTML.
Build a hotspot-mapping tool for images, floorplans, or diagrams where I can define irregular clickable regions.
Create a local magazine article index for a specialized subject collection with search and tags.
Build a field guide that helps me identify conifer species from observable traits during a walk.
Create a focused local process monitor that shows running processes, CPU and memory usage, and simple filtering.
Build a local list-cleanup utility that sorts lines, normalizes case, removes duplicates, and strips extra whitespace.
Create an offline scuba dive log with dive details, search, per-dive notes, and simple summary statistics.
Build an interactive molecular learning environment with guided tutorials and basic knowledge checks.
Create a turtle-graphics programming environment for beginners with immediate visual output, loops, and simple procedures.
Build a unit-conversion utility where I enter a value, choose source and target units, and see the converted result instantly.
Create a greyline clock that shows current UTC time and day-night transition context for selected cities.
Build a currency converter where I enter an amount and get the converted value along with the exchange rate details.
Create a lightweight bookmark manager with titles, tags, search, sorting, and export to HTML or JSON.
Build a bicycle gear calculator that shows gear ratios and gear inches from chainring, cassette, and wheel-size inputs.
Create a client-side map of biblical-era locations with searchable sites, overlays, and exportable current view.
Build a local text encryption tool that lets me paste text, set a passphrase, encrypt or decrypt, and export the result.
Create a print-ready home vision screening sheet with instructions, simple result recording, and follow-up guidance.
Build a local ebook assembly tool that turns a plain-text manuscript into a structured digital book package.
Create a simple calendar with per-day editable notes, month navigation, and local storage.
Build a general unit converter that handles common measurement domains in one compact local tool.
Create a history learning module that presents short event scenes, asks recall questions, and tracks score.
Build a constitutional study module with original text, annotations, and interpretive context for selected provisions.
Create a bounded reader for a canonical literary work with integrated scholarly notes and study aids.
Build a desktop tool that imports text files, extracts URLs, removes duplicates, and opens selected links in the browser.
Create a recent-URL finder that helps me recover a website I visited but forgot to bookmark.
Build a quick reference tool for looking up world capitals by country or region filter.
Create a function graphing calculator where I enter equations, adjust axis range, and visualize the graph.
Build a rule-based text transformer that previews the result before applying cleanup operations.
Create a lottery helper where I can check my numbers against a draw and generate new number picks.
Build a personal reading tracker where I note what book I am reading, my progress, and a few quick reflections.
Create a sentence generator that fills templates from word lists and can optionally read the results aloud.
Build an Ohm’s law calculator that solves for the missing electrical value from the inputs I provide.
Create a local password generator with configurable length, character sets, and one-click copy.
Build a utility that repairs broken file and folder references after drives or folders have been moved or renamed.
Create a cleanup tool that finds orphaned preference and config files left behind by uninstalled applications.
Build an archive locator that helps me find files across dozens of offline or unmounted drives without connecting them all.
Create a form-driven wizard that helps non-technical users publish a simple personal profile web page without coding.
Build a weighted decision helper that compares options against criteria and produces a ranked recommendation with explanation.
